images.alt:
A dark, atmospheric painting with a heavy canvas texture, rendered in a palette of charcoal, sepia, and muted orange. On the left, a tall, spindly tree with bare, jagged branches stands in silhouette. Near its base, the dark figure of a witch is visible, wearing a classic pointed hat and tattered robes, leaning on a tall, gnarled staff. She faces a large, heavy wooden door that stands open in the center of the frame, seemingly floating without a house attached. Beyond the threshold, the view transitions into a deep, starlit night sky featuring a glowing crescent moon and a faint, floating geometric cube. Above the doorway, a mass of thick, black, ink-like vines or roots erupts upward, twisting into the overcast, smoky sky. The lighting is low and moody, focusing on the contrast between the dark foreground and the celestial light emanating from the portal.

Keywords:
witch, portal, crescent moon, stars, dark fantasy, doorway, gnarled branches, canvas texture, sepia, gothic, surrealism, staff

A high-fashion, surreal portrait of a young woman viewed from a profile perspective. She wears an avant-garde garment and headpiece constructed entirely from oversized, creamy white flower petals that resemble tulips or peonies. The headpiece is voluminous and glows with an intense, warm golden light from within, casting a soft radiance across her fair skin and blonde hair. Her expression is serene and contemplative as she looks toward a soft-focus background of a tall, arched window. The dress is a dense thicket of thick, sculptural petals that drape over her shoulders, creating a heavy, organic texture. The overall atmosphere is dreamlike and ethereal, characterized by high-key lighting, soft shadows, and a neutral, minimalist interior setting that emphasizes the warmth of the light emanating from the floral crown.

A somber, painterly depiction of a medieval Scottish-style castle, reminiscent of Eilean Donan, perched on a rocky outcrop. The stone fortress is dark and weathered, featuring a prominent square keep and lower defensive walls that overlook a calm, dark body of water. A low, arched stone bridge connects the castle to the mainland on the right. The landscape is characterized by dry, golden-brown grasses and gnarled, leafless trees, suggesting late autumn or winter. The background is dominated by a heavy, oppressive fog that blends into a textured, vertical-streaked sky, making the distant mountains appear as ghostly, faded silhouettes. The overall color palette is muted, favoring charcoal greys, earthy ochres, and desaturated whites, creating a cold, melancholic, and timeless atmosphere.

castle, fortress, mist, highlands, ruins, bridge, fog, gothic, melancholy, stone, water, brooding

record.text:
Whoa 🤯

The Moon, in full eclipse, with the #Artemis II Orion spacecraft. Part of the Moon and spacecraft are lit by Earthshine, and both Saturn and Mars are visible to the lower right. Incredible. Details: images.nasa.gov/details/art0...

images.alt: [alt text by NASA] The Moon, seen here backlit by the Sun during a solar eclipse on April 6, 2026, is photographed by one of the cameras on the Orion spacecraft’s solar array wings. Orion is visible in the foreground on the left. Earth is reflecting sunlight at the left edge of the Moon, which is slightly brighter than the rest of the disk. The bright spot visible just below the Moon’s bottom right edge is Saturn. Beyond that, the bright spot at the right edge of the image is Mars. Credit: NASA

[alt text by NASA] The Moon, seen here backlit by the Sun during a solar eclipse on April 6, 2026, is photographed by one of the cameras on the Orion spacecraft’s solar array wings. Orion is visible in the foreground on the left. Earth is reflecting sunlight at the left edge of the Moon, which is slightly brighter than the rest of the disk.
